description: You are a safety officer. Create a synchronized Picture-in-Picture (PiP) composite video of an incident from two unsynchronized dashcams: '/home/ga/Videos/front_camera.mp4' (1920x1080) and '/home/ga/Videos/cabin_camera.mp4' (1280x720). Synchronize the footage using the 0.5s full-screen color flash that occurs in both videos. The resulting 1920x1080 video at /home/ga/Videos/incident_composite.mp4 must use the front_camera as the background and the cabin_camera scaled to 640x360 as an overlay in the bottom-right corner with 20-pixel margins from the right and bottom edges. The final output must be trimmed to start 5.0 seconds before the synchronized flash and end 10.0 seconds after (15.0 seconds total duration), using only the audio from the cabin_camera.
